steps.title: Add the coefficients
steps.content: Add the coefficients: $18+21-11=28$, so the expression equals $28x^{5}$. Hence $b=28$. The answer is 28.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $28$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $28$.
